title: MasterFreeze
description: Freeze a player on the spot
body:
# Freeze
Freezes a player in place

## File :
lang.yml : Manages error messages and display

## Commandes :
/freeze Joueur : Freezes a player in place and harasses them with messages + darkness

/unfreeze Joueur : Removes all previous effects from players

## Permissions :
freeze.freeze : /freeze

freeze.unfreeze : /unfreeze

freeze.message : Receive messages & orders from freeze people

freeze.bypass : Allows freeze only by admins

freeze.admin : Completely prevents freezing
